<!-- indicator: tbl-hud-housing -->

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| label: tbl-hud-housing
#| tbl-cap: 'Number of people living in HUD-Subsidized Housing in the Past 12 Months, 2021–2024'
from scripts.cha_registry_renderer import render_table_object
render_table_object(object_id="tbl-hud-housing", workbook_path=CHA_WORKBOOK_PATH)
```

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
from IPython.display import Markdown, display
from scripts.cha_registry_renderer import render_source_callout_for_object
display(Markdown(render_source_callout_for_object("tbl-hud-housing", CHA_WORKBOOK_PATH)))
```
